data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the cancellation penalty scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the cancellation with penalty fee scenario, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the enforcement of the penalty for cancellations made within 48 hours. The linked use case describes the penalty but lacks concrete evidence of the system's ability to enforce this requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict. Additionally, prior steps indicate that there is no evidence of cancellation tracking or penalty enforcement, which is critical for this validation.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation tracking or penalty enforcement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
